method: Generated single source of truth. Website pages display this JSON and do not calculate separate bullpen scores in the browser.
note: Uses the locked audit formula. Reliever counts are context only and do not add hidden score points.
formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6)

teams.label: High risk
teams.workload_read: Heavy recent workload. Late-game pitching condition could materially affect the read.
teams.score_reason: Score 100/100 (High risk). Formula: 45 + ((19 - 9) x 3.5) + ((2.7 - 3) x 4) + (4 x 6). Last game bullpen IP: 2.7. Three-day bullpen IP: 19. Back-to-back arms: 4. Relievers used: 3 last game, 14 over three days. Context only, not score points.
teams.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

teams.label: Tired
teams.workload_read: Elevated recent workload. Full-game angles deserve extra late-inning caution.
teams.score_reason: Score 67/100 (Tired). Formula: 45 + ((9 - 9) x 3.5) + ((4 - 3) x 4) + (3 x 6). Last game bullpen IP: 4. Three-day bullpen IP: 9. Back-to-back arms: 3. Relievers used: 3 last game, 8 over three days. Context only, not score points.
teams.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

teams.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
teams.score_reason: Score 60/100 (Normal). Formula: 45 + ((11.3 - 9) x 3.5) + ((4.7 - 3) x 4) + (0 x 6). Last game bullpen IP: 4.7. Three-day bullpen IP: 11.3. Back-to-back arms: 0. Relievers used: 5 last game, 13 over three days. Context only, not score points.
